title: Blondie in the Real World
description: Blondie lives in her perfect doll world. She is happy, but one day she realizes that something is wrong with her life. Her life is too artificial and perfect. Blondie decides to go to the real world and do real things to feel real. Help the Blonde to embody her image in makeup. Bake a cake for the guests and put things in order together with Blondie in her new apartment. Pick up a delightful party outfit for her and remember that Blondies favorite colors are pink, gold and white.
instructions: Depending on the gaming device a computer mouse click or a simple touch on touch screens is used for control
